column5: If the robot failed, which of the below corrections do you think would have helped your communication? (Pick Top 3)

column5: Self-Correction & Acknowledgment — “My mistake — the item is in drawer 1.”, Guided Reset — “Let’s reset. Close all drawers and say the item again.”, Transparency Cue — “I’m recalibrating — one moment… ready now.”
column6: Lights pulsing or flashing briefly to show that the robot detected an error, A quick screen cue (for example, a check mark or alert symbol) showing the robot is correcting itself., Repeating the drawer highlight to reinforce the correction
